summary: Login screen blinking/refresh loop bug fix (THIRD ATTEMPT) verified. Safe Mode auto-reload DISABLED. All 5 tests passed - NO page reloads detected during login flow.

features_tested.feature: Login flow works without ANY page reload or blinking
features_tested.details: Logout/login cycle completed with 0 page load events - no blinking detected
Monitored for 8 seconds during login, 5 seconds post-login - zero reload events
Lines 928-934 in App.js are commented out - Safe Mode only triggers manually now

features_tested.feature: User can log in and dashboard appears stably
features_tested.details: Dashboard visible at 500ms after login click, stable for 5+ seconds

features_tested.feature: No useEffect causing reload during auth state changes
features_tested.details: useEffect at line 924 now has empty dependencies [], global error handlers at 939-962 are disabled

safe_mode_auto_trigger_disabled.change: COMMENTED OUT - Code that checked shouldEnterSafeMode() and called window.location.reload() is disabled
safe_mode_auto_trigger_disabled.impact: Safe Mode now only triggers manually via System Repair dialog

global_error_handlers_disabled.change: COMMENTED OUT - Error handlers that logged crashes are disabled
global_error_handlers_disabled.impact: Errors still log to console but won't trigger safe mode or reloads

useEffect_dependencies_fixed.change: Empty dependency array [] - no longer includes [loading, user]
useEffect_dependencies_fixed.impact: Effect only runs once on mount, not on every auth state change

test_methodology.description: Used Playwright's 'load' event listener to track any page reloads during login/logout cycle

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login blinking bug fix (third attempt) verified. Key changes: (1) Safe Mode auto-trigger at App.js:928-934 is COMMENTED OUT - no longer calls window.location.reload(), (2) Global error handlers at App.js:939-962 are COMMENTED OUT - no more crash logging that could trigger safe mode, (3) useEffect at line 924 has empty dependencies [] - no longer runs on [loading, user] changes. All login scenarios work without any page reloads.
